seo.title: PikFun | Pickleball Community, Shop, Courts & Coaching in Taiwan
seo.description: Taiwan's largest pickleball community and information platform. Find courts, join games, shop gear, connect with coaches, and meet fellow players.

service.desc: We bring together shopping, open play, coaching, and learning content so you can find everything pickleball in one place. Hand-picked paddles and accessories, quick ways to find players and sessions, one-on-one coaching, plus rule guides and mini games to get you started with ease. It's more than buying gear — it's joining a growing sports community. PikFun keeps expanding its services so every player can enjoy this easy-to-learn sport.

about.heading_line2: standing side by side with every player.
about.desc: PikFun believes pickleball is more than a sport — it's a way to connect people. From your first grip and first rally to finding regular partners and hosting weekly games, we want to lower the barrier to entry so more people can meet on the court. Whether you're a curious beginner or a veteran looking for regular sessions, you'll find your own rhythm here. We offer gear, open play, coaching, and learning resources to take you from curious to hooked — sweating it out and enjoying every shot together.
about.img_alt: Swinging a paddle on the pickleball court

partners.heading: What is PikFun?
partners.desc_line1: PikFun aims to be Taiwan's largest pickleball information platform.
partners.desc_line2: From open play and coaching to gear picks,
partners.desc_line3: we help every player find what they need and get on the court with ease.
partners.video_unsupported: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

items.title: The New National Sport
items.desc: Pickleball perfectly blends elements of tennis, badminton, and table tennis. Played on a badminton-sized court with composite paddles and a perforated plastic ball, it is easy to pick up yet highly competitive and fun — beginners and seasoned athletes alike quickly fall for its charm.

items.title: Fastest-Growing Sport, 3 Years Running
items.desc: According to the latest SFIA statistics, pickleball has topped the list of America's fastest-growing sports for several consecutive years, with over 36 million participants in the US alone. The wave is sweeping the globe, with participation and dedicated venues in Asia and Taiwan growing exponentially.

items.title: A Social Experience Across Generations
items.desc: Pickleball is more than a sport — it's a bridge for building community. The smaller court brings players closer together, filling every match with laughter and interaction. It breaks the limits of age and fitness, making cross-generational play an everyday joy and the perfect way to unwind and expand your social circle.
